name: Lo Cal Lemon Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Evaporated skim milk, well chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and beat well.
2. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream maker or divide into two freezer trays and freeze until it reaches a mushy consistency.
3. Pour the mixture into a large bowl and beat well. Repack into a container and freeze until firm.
Calories per 1/2 cup serving: 51
Exchange: 1 fruit source
